question:
What is the widely held moral view on the difference between a mistake and a calculated betrayal?
A) Mistakes are legally punishable, while betrayals are not.
B) Betrayals can only happen between strangers.
C) A mistake implies a lack of malicious intent, whereas a calculated betrayal requires a conscious decision to deceive.
D) Mistakes are always made on purpose but hidden well.
